doctor_turn: Hello, I’m Dr. Lee. What brought you in today?
patient_turn: Hi, Dr. Lee. I've been feeling unwell for the past three days with a fever, a stuffy nose, and a sore throat. My husband has had similar symptoms, so I wanted to get checked out.

doctor_turn: When did your symptoms start, and have they changed since then?
patient_turn: My symptoms started about three days ago. They haven't really changed much; I've still got the fever, stuffy nose, and sore throat, but no cough or other major issues.

doctor_turn: Where exactly do you feel the pain or discomfort in your throat?
patient_turn: It's mostly a general soreness in my throat, especially when I swallow, but I wouldn't say it's extremely painful. Just uncomfortable, you know?

doctor_turn: What does the soreness in your throat feel like—sharp, dull, or something else?
patient_turn: It feels more dull than sharp, just a constant discomfort. It's not unbearable, but it's definitely noticeable.

doctor_turn: When did you first notice the soreness in your throat?
patient_turn: I first noticed the soreness in my throat around the same time my fever started, so about three days ago. It was one of the first symptoms I had.

doctor_turn: Have you noticed if the sore throat or fever has changed in intensity since it started?
patient_turn: ... started, but I think it might be... not sure.

doctor_turn: Have you noticed any other symptoms along with your sore throat?
patient_turn: Yes, I've had some muscle aches along with the sore throat and fever, but that's about it. No cough or other major symptoms.

doctor_turn: Have you traveled outside the province recently, aside from the hiking trip?
patient_turn: No, I haven't traveled outside the province recently, except for that two-hour hiking trip last weekend.

doctor_turn: How long has your husband been experiencing symptoms?
patient_turn: My husband has been experiencing similar symptoms for about a week now. He started feeling unwell before I did.

doctor_turn: What do you do for work?
patient_turn: I work from home as a digital marketing agent. It's nice to be able to work remotely, but I wish I felt better to focus on my tasks.

doctor_turn: Do you smoke or drink alcohol regularly?
patient_turn: I don't smoke, and I drink alcohol only occasionally, like one or two glasses of wine now and then.

doctor_turn: Have you used marijuana edibles recently or in the past few weeks?
patient_turn: I’ve tried marijuana edibles in the past, but I don’t use recreational drugs regularly. I haven’t used any recently.

doctor_turn: Have you ever been diagnosed with high blood pressure?
patient_turn: No, I haven't been diagnosed with high blood pressure. I don't have a history of hypertension or hyperlipidemia.

doctor_turn: Yes, I monitor my glucose levels since I'm prediabetic.
patient_turn: Yes, I monitor my glucose levels since I'm prediabetic. It's important for me to keep an eye on that.

doctor_turn: Have you had any surgeries or hospitalizations in the past?
patient_turn: I had a cholecystectomy five years ago, but I haven't had any other surgeries or hospitalizations.

doctor_turn: What happens when you take penicillin?
patient_turn: When I take penicillin, I get a rash, but it doesn't cause any respiratory distress. That's why I avoid it.

doctor_turn: What medications or supplements are you currently taking?
patient_turn: I'm only taking multivitamins right now. I don't take any other medications.

doctor_turn: When was your last menstrual period?
patient_turn: My last menstrual period was about a year ago.

doctor_turn: Have you received the flu vaccine for this year?
patient_turn: No, I haven't received the flu vaccine for this year.

doctor_turn: Have you had a COVID-19 test recently?
patient_turn: No, I haven't had recent COVID-19 testing.
